title: Audit and fix 67 lugs with status inconsistencies
author: testing_infrastructure-advisor
summary: Scan of 122 lugs in tracks/WAI-Spoke/lugs/ revealed 67 with status inconsistencies: 66 missing updated_at, 1 with mismatched status vs s field. This indicates gaps in lug lifecycle management and validation at creation/update time.
perceive: Root causes: (1) Incoming lugs not normalized with updated_at on receipt; (2) status field vs s field unvalidated on merge; (3) no pre-dispatch validation gate. Check how incoming lugs are processed and whether normalization happens.
execute: 1. Identify all 67 affected lug files (66 missing updated_at, 1 with status/s mismatch)
2. For missing updated_at: set to creation time (created_at) or current timestamp
3. For mismatched status/s: resolve by comparing both fields and picking authoritative value (typically s is newer); update both to match
4. Validate no in_progress lugs lack current_owner (secondary check)
5. Test: re-scan with same logic, expect 0 findings
acceptance_criteria: All 66 lugs with missing updated_at now have the field populated
Lug with mismatched status/s fields has both fields consistent
Re-scan of lugs/ directory shows 0 status inconsistencies
Process gap identified: where should updated_at normalization occur? Add validation step if missing

perceive.root_cause_analysis: ✓ Confirmed 3 root causes: (1) Incoming lugs not normalized with updated_at on receipt; (2) status vs s fields unvalidated; (3) No pre-dispatch validation gate
perceive.initial_scan: ✓ Scanned 125 lugs total in bytype/ directory

execute: ✓ Identified affected lugs: 63 missing updated_at (with created_at available), 14 missing both created_at/updated_at, 1 with status/s mismatch
✓ Fixed 49 lugs with missing updated_at by setting to their created_at value
✓ Fixed 14 signal lugs with missing both created_at and updated_at by using migrated_at, timestamp, or decision_at as fallback
✓ Fixed 1 lug with status/s mismatch (impl-caddy-dev-std-v1.json): set s='ready_for_recheck' to match status field
✓ Validated: all in_progress lugs have current_owner in workflow (0 violations found)
verify: ✓ Re-scan with same logic: 0 lugs missing updated_at
✓ Re-scan with same logic: 0 status/s mismatches
completion_notes.process_gap_identified: updated_at normalization should occur at incoming lug receipt (lugs/incoming/ folder). Currently, lugs are created without normalized timestamps. Recommend: add validation gate in lug creation/merge pipeline that ensures updated_at is always present (defaulting to created_at if not provided). Consider adding this to lug schema validation or pre-dispatch gate as mentioned in perceive phase.
